name: Sunny Biscuit
description: Meet Sunny Biscuit, a brave golden pup with a heart full of adventure. Her posable joints let her sit, stand, and wave. Scan her adoption code to unlock her unique AI-generated life story and personality.
features: 9 posable joints (head, arms, elbows, legs, knees)
story_preview: Brave, loyal, and always ready for an adventure...
story_full: On a warm spring morning in the dandelion fields of Golden Valley, a tiny pup opened her eyes for the first time. A gentle breeze carried dandelion seeds through the air, and one landed right on her nose. She sneezed — and the wind carried the seeds even farther, spreading joy across the entire valley. From that moment, she knew her purpose: to bring adventure and courage to whoever needed it most. Her first friend was a little bluebird who taught her to whistle. She still whistles when she's excited. Sunny Biscuit has been waiting for someone brave enough to take her on adventures. Is that you?
skill: Expert whistle imitator (learned from a bluebird)

name: Coco Cloud
description: Coco Cloud is the softest cuddle companion you'll ever meet. Her fluffy cream curls and gentle personality make her the perfect comfort pup. 9 posable joints and changeable outfits included.
story_preview: The softest cloud in the sky decided to become a puppy...

name: Lucky Mochi
description: Lucky Mochi is a chocolate-brown sweetheart with floppy ears and the gentlest eyes. Quiet, loyal, and always by your side.
story_preview: Found sleeping in a bowl of mochi...

name: Pepper Spot
description: Pepper Spot is the mischievous little rascal you didn't know you needed. Black-and-white spotted coat, always up to something fun.
story_preview: Born during a thunderstorm — and loved every second...

name: Storm Shadow
description: Storm Shadow is the cool, mysterious one. Grey wolf-style coat, piercing eyes, and a sassy independent streak.
story_preview: Doesn't need anyone. But secretly wants you...
quirk: Pretends not to care (but watches you when you're not looking)

name: Sugar Puff
description: Sugar Puff is our premium princess — pure cream-white fluff with the sweetest face. The most popular adoption choice. Comes with exclusive deluxe adoption kit.
story_preview: Born on a cloud made of cotton candy...
skill: Making everyone fall in love instantly

name: Tofu Blossom
description: Tofu Blossom has the iconic Samoyed smile that melts hearts instantly. Pure white, always grinning, always ready to be your friend.
story_preview: Her smile is so bright, flowers turn toward her...

name: Maple Biscuit
description: Maple Biscuit looks like a tiny fox with her orange-brown coat and pointed ears. Clever, quick, and full of surprises.
story_preview: Found a secret map... follows her nose everywhere...
quirk: Hides little treasures in her bed

name: Willow Waffle
description: Willow Waffle has the classic border collie markings and the smartest eyes. A problem-solver with a deeply loving heart.
story_preview: She organizes her toys by color. Every. Single. Night...
skill: Learning every trick in under 5 minutes

name: River Pudding
description: River Pudding is all soft brown curls and warm cuddles. A teddy-bear-style pup who just wants to be loved.
story_preview: Drifted downstream on a lily pad, looking for a home...
quirk: Hums a tiny tune when content
skill: Best hugger in the entire collection

name: Bouncy Peanut
description: Bouncy Peanut never stops moving — this spotted hound-style pup is pure energy and joy. 9 posable joints let you capture every zoomie moment.
story_preview: Born mid-jump. Hasn't stopped bouncing since...

name: Daisy Mochi
description: Daisy Mochi has the iconic corgi proportions — long body, short legs, ears always perked. White and tan coat. Irresistibly cute.
story_preview: Short legs, long body, infinite charm...

name: Honey Socks
description: Honey Socks is a long-bodied dachshund-style pup with the most soulful eyes. Honey-brown with tiny little legs and a big heart.
story_preview: Her eyes tell a thousand stories before she makes a sound...
quirk: Always has one ear flipped inside out
skill: Melting hearts with a single glance

name: Misty Doodle
description: Misty Doodle is elegant silver-grey with a poodle-style poof. Refined, a little spoiled, and she absolutely knows it.
story_preview: Born in a Parisian bakery. Still smells faintly of croissants...
quirk: Refuses to sit on anything less than silk

name: Copper Star
description: Copper Star has the striking Doberman markings in rich copper-red. Protective, loyal, and surprisingly gentle. A guardian with a golden heart.
story_preview: Stands guard while you sleep. Hasn't slept in 3 years...

name: Clover Patch
description: Clover Patch is a tri-color collie-style sweetheart — brown, white, and black patches. The most nurturing pup you'll ever meet.
story_preview: Heals boo-boos with a single lick. Certified puppy nurse...
skill: Knowing exactly when you need comfort

name: Noodle Bean
description: Noodle Bean is a whippet-style pup — sleek, elegant, with the longest legs. Light gold coat, always striking a pose.
story_preview: Faster than light. More elegant than a ballet dancer...
skill: Running in slow motion (for dramatic effect)

name: Snowball Chip
description: Snowball Chip has the signature butterfly-dog ears — big, perky, and impossibly expressive. Pure white fluff with a playful spirit.
story_preview: Her ears can hear a treat bag opening from 3 miles away...
quirk: Ears express more emotions than words

name: Cinnamon Roll
description: Cinnamon Roll is round, soft, and irresistibly squeezable — a bear-style pup in warm cinnamon brown. The ultimate comfort friend.
story_preview: Found in a bakery. Was mistaken for actual cinnamon roll...
skill: Being the softest thing you've ever touched

name: Mango Tango
description: Mango Tango is bright mango-yellow with playful spots — a mixed-breed pup who radiates pure sunshine. Every day is a new adventure.
story_preview: Ripened under the tropical sun. Bursting with vitamin joy...
skill: Turning any day into a fiesta

name: Marshmallow Dream
description: Marshmallow Dream is ultra-rare — white-to-pink gradient coat with a tiny unicorn horn. The most magical puppy in the entire collection. Limited edition.
story_preview: Only 500 exist. Each one contains real stardust (probably)...

name: Sailor Outfit Set
description: Adorable sailor-style outfit for your Mochidog puppy. Includes hat, top, and shorts. Fits all 30cm Mochidog puppies. Machine-washable fabric.

name: Cozy Hoodie Set
description: Keep your puppy cozy in this mini hoodie set. Drawstring hood, front pocket, comes in cream or grey. Fits all 30cm Mochidog puppies.

name: Party Dress Set
description: Dress your puppy for the occasion! Tulle skirt, satin bow, and matching headband. Available in pink or lavender.

name: Explorer Vest Set
description: Rugged explorer vest with multiple pockets, matching bandana, and tiny compass charm. Perfect for adventurous puppies.

name: Pajama Set
description: Soft cotton pajama set with star print. Includes top + pants + tiny sleep mask. For cozy puppy nights.

name: Sunglasses Pack
description: 3 pairs of tiny sunglasses: aviator, round retro, and heart-shaped. Fits all Mochidog puppies. Instant cool factor.

name: Hat Collection
description: Bucket hat + beret + baseball cap. Mix and match for daily puppy style. Fits all Mochidog puppies.

name: Tiny Shoes Set
description: 2 pairs of tiny sneakers (white + pink). Slip-on style with elastic band. Fits Mochidog puppy paws.

name: Adoption Bundle — Complete Starter Kit
description: The complete adoption experience: 1 Mochidog puppy of your choice + 2 outfits + sunglasses + hat + shoes + premium adoption box + framed certificate. Save 20% vs buying separately.

name: Starter Outfit Bundle
description: 3 essential outfits to start your puppy's wardrobe: 1 casual + 1 formal + 1 cozy set. Save 15% vs buying individually.
